name: Magnetix Flux
details: Electric type damaging moves have a 50% chance to slow the target.

name: Frozen Heart
details: Ice type moves deal 50% more damage.

name: Thermal Bloom
details: User heals 10% hp every turn under sun or hail/snow. Fire type moves are boosted by 25% in the hail/snow, and ice type moves are boosted by 25% in the sun.

name: Prism Capacitor
details: The user's next Psychic type attack after taking damage from a special move deals 50% move damage.

name: Hot Streak
details: User is immune to fire type attacks, and receives a speed boost upon being hit by one.

name: Mint Condition
details: Gains attack and speed when hit by a grass type move, or when grassy terrain is set.

name: Withering Aura
details: User steals 1/8th of an attackers max HP when hit by a contact move.
